name: Dark Circles Buff
description: Spawns dark circles randomly throughout every level. Configure min/max count in settings.

enabled.name: Enable Dark Circles
enabled.description: Toggle whether dark circles appear in levels.

min-circles.name: Minimum Circles
min-circles.description: Minimum number of dark circles that can spawn in a level.

max-circles.name: Maximum Circles
max-circles.description: Maximum number of dark circles that can spawn in a level. A random number between min and max is chosen each time.

circle-scale.name: Circle Scale
circle-scale.description: How large each dark circle is (1.0 = default, 2.0 = double size).

circle-opacity.name: Circle Opacity
circle-opacity.description: Opacity of dark circles (0 = invisible, 255 = fully opaque).

spread-vertical.name: Vertical Spread
spread-vertical.description: How spread out vertically the circles are (in GD units).
